description: Creates a coordinate grid on a plane anchored at a point, using the plane's spanning vectors.
utility: Draw a linear combination coordinate grid on a 3D plane

arguments.name: plane
arguments.description: The plane whose spanning vectors define the grid axes

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: The anchor point (origin of the grid)

arguments.name: styles
arguments.description: Optional: c(), s(), fo() for color and styling

alternates.description: Grid on a plane anchored at a point
Grid with custom color and opacity

examples.scenario: Linear combination grid on a span plane
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
v1 = vector3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 1, 0, 0))
v2 = vector3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 0, 1, 0))
P = spanplane3d(G, v1, v2, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0))
O = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
grid = lineargrid3d(G, P, O)
